markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress, traffic, and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aembit is pivoting to "IAM for Agentic AI" to own the term; content will now focus on this specific angle.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [A recent blog traffic spike (Oct 5–11) was traced to influencer shares, not GrowthX content, and has since corrected to baseline (\~400 views/week).](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [LLMs fail technical accuracy checks (e.g., hallucinating on "attestation"); the glossary will be built as the definitive source of truth to fix this.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [GrowthX will prioritize glossary pages for Agentic AI and MCP, while Aembit reviews a backlog of revised articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Feedback

  - [Ehtisham has published 2 articles and submitted 30+ revised articles and outlines for review.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Aembit team has a review backlog due to other deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Ashur will review the "Agentic AI" glossary pages today (Oct 22).](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Feedback should be shared asynchronously via docs/Slack to maintain workflow momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

### Blog Traffic Analysis

  - [**Baseline:** \~400–450 views & \~250 active users/week (organic).](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [**Spike (Oct 5–11):** Views +100, active users +100.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Cause:** Influencer shares of high-performing technical articles (e.g., Red Hat breach, MCP auth).](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**Correction:** Traffic returned to baseline the following week.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**GrowthX Article Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - ["Secret Sprawl" and "Securing AI agents" consistently drive traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [17 of 26 published articles are active; 4–5 underperforming articles are candidates for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Goal:** Increase publishing frequency to 5 articles/week to boost organic traffic and crawler visits.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Strategy Pivot: "IAM for Agentic AI"

  - [Aembit is pivoting its core message to "IAM for Agentic AI" to own the term and improve relatability.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Content will now focus on this specific angle, moving beyond the broader "workload IAM" concept.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [A pillar page for "IAM for Agentic AI" will be created to establish authority.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Technical Accuracy & The Glossary

  - [**Problem:** Technical inaccuracies in articles persist, as standard LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) fail to self-correct.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Experiment:** An LLM only detected an error in a paragraph on "attestation" *after* being fed Ashur's specific feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [**Solution:** The glossary will become the definitive source of truth for Aembit's technical terms.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [**Process:** Aembit will flag critical terms (e.g., "attestation") in the OS glossary list for deep review.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ensure these definitions are precise and reflect Aembit's product usage.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ashur:** Review "Agentic AI" glossary pages today.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Dan:** Investigate influencer sharing data from the Oct 5–11 traffic spike.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [Continue producing Agentic AI glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [Prioritize glossary terms by relevance to Agentic AI, then MCP.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Share the prioritized glossary list with the Aembit team.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [**Aembit Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Review the backlog of revised articles and outlines.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [Flag critical Aembit-specific terms in the OS glossary list for deep review.](https://fathom.video/share/5myYE_y5SPh71sxvjxF3yJ5gZxsu87sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
